text: What is the operational limitation of security equipment like a weld lock?

options.text: It can easily fail due to high vibrations
The weld locks can be cut open
It can only be operated electronically

explanation: While weld locks offer a degree of physical security, their primary operational limitation lies in their vulnerability to determined intruders with appropriate tools. Weld locks, like other physical barriers, can be cut, ground, or broken open using specialized equipment, thereby compromising their protective function.
